rulings.Case Title: THIRD EYE BLIND,INC VS. NORTH AMERICAN SPECIALTY INSURANCE CO
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings; Request For Judicial Notice
rulings.Rulings: *DEFENDANT PROVIDENT FINANCIAL MANAGEMENT'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings; Request For Judicial Notice -- GRANT, judgment on the pleadings. Prevailing party to prepare order. Claims predicated against defendants for procuring insufficient policies, however, court has found policies were sufficient. Deny attorney's fees. (REQ/302/RS)
